name: Montana Capital Car Title Loans
description_short: Louisville's Montana Capital Car Title Loans at 7506 Fegenbush Ln offers fast car title loans in Kentucky.
description_long:
Montana Capital Car Title Loans is located at 7506 Fegenbush Ln in Louisville, KY. This standalone storefront operates Monday through Friday from 9 AM to 7 PM, with Saturday hours from 10 AM to 5 PM (closed Sundays). The location serves the Louisville area with quick access for residents needing immediate title loan services.

At this Louisville branch, you can apply for car title loans using your vehicle as collateral. The team at 502-586-3289 can answer questions about loan amounts, terms, and your eligibility. Services include title assessment, fast approval decisions, and flexible repayment options designed for Louisville borrowers.

If you need quick cash in Louisville and have a clear car title, this location is worth a visit. Bring your vehicle title, photo ID, proof of residence, and vehicle registration. Montana Capital's Louisville location provides same-day funding options for qualified borrowers.
pros: No credit check — bad credit and prior bankruptcies explicitly accepted
Loan range of $100 to $50,000 covers both small and large emergencies
Free pre-approval in under 5 minutes with no credit score impact
Borrower keeps driving the car throughout the repayment period
cons: APR and interest rates are not disclosed anywhere on the website
Vehicle is at risk of repossession if loan is not repaid
Funds issued as a Bank of America check, not cash or direct deposit (per customer review)
Only 59 Google reviews for a company claiming 375,000+ customers — limited independent verification
Title loans are a high-cost product; no lower-cost alternatives or warnings are presented
best_for: Car owners with bad credit or bankruptcy history who need fast emergency cash
Borrowers who need funds same-day and cannot qualify for a personal loan
People who own their vehicle outright and need to leverage its equity quickly
Those who have been turned down by banks or traditional lenders
diagnosis: Montana Capital is best suited for vehicle owners with poor or no credit who need emergency cash quickly and have no access to lower-cost options. The main caveat is that this is a high-cost secured loan — the APR is never disclosed on the site, and defaulting puts your vehicle at risk of repossession.
meta_description: Montana Capital Car Title Loans at 7506 Fegenbush Ln, Louisville, KY. Fast approval for car title loans.
seo_title: Montana Capital Car Title Loans in Louisville, KY
